member.name: T:Axion.Extensions.Polly.Caching.Hybrid.CachingStrategyOptions`1
member.summary: Represents the options used to configure a caching strategy.
member.typeparam: The type of result the retry strategy handles.

member.name: M:Axion.Extensions.Polly.Caching.Hybrid.CachingStrategyOptions`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Axion.Extensions.Polly.Caching.Hybrid.CachingStrategyOptions`1.HybridCache
member.summary: Gets and sets an instance of used for caching.

member.name: P:Axion.Extensions.Polly.Caching.Hybrid.CachingStrategyOptions`1.HybridCacheGetFlagsProvider
member.summary: Gets or sets a provider to get a to get a cached value.

member.name: P:Axion.Extensions.Polly.Caching.Hybrid.CachingStrategyOptions`1.CacheKeyProvider
member.summary: Gets or sets a provider to get a cache key otherwise is used.

member.name: P:Axion.Extensions.Polly.Caching.Hybrid.CachingStrategyOptions`1.HybridCacheSetEntryOptionsProvider
member.summary: Gets or sets a provider to get a to set the cached value.

member.name: P:Axion.Extensions.Polly.Caching.Hybrid.CachingStrategyOptions`1.CacheEntryTagsProvider
member.summary: Gets or sets a provider to get cache tags.

member.name: P:Axion.Extensions.Polly.Caching.Hybrid.CachingStrategyOptions`1.OnCacheHit
member.summary: Gets or sets a delegate that is called when an item is fetched from the cache.

member.name: P:Axion.Extensions.Polly.Caching.Hybrid.CachingStrategyOptions`1.OnCacheMiss
member.summary: Gets or sets a delegate that is called when an item is missing in the cache.

member.name: P:Axion.Extensions.Polly.Caching.Hybrid.CachingStrategyOptions`1.OnCacheReadError
member.summary: Gets or sets a delegate that is called when a cache reading error occurs.

member.name: P:Axion.Extensions.Polly.Caching.Hybrid.CachingStrategyOptions`1.OnCacheWriteError
member.summary: Gets or sets a delegate that is called when a cache writing error occurs.

member.name: T:Axion.Extensions.Polly.Caching.Hybrid.OnCacheHitArgument`1
member.summary: An argument when an entry is fetched from the cache.
member.typeparam: The type of result the retry strategy handles.
member.param: The cache key of the entry.
The entry that was read from the cache.

member.summary: An argument when an entry is fetched from the cache.
member.typeparam: The type of result the retry strategy handles.
member.param: The cache key of the entry.
The entry that was read from the cache.

member.summary: The cache key of the entry.

member.name: P:Axion.Extensions.Polly.Caching.Hybrid.OnCacheHitArgument`1.Result
member.summary: The entry that was read from the cache.

member.name: T:Axion.Extensions.Polly.Caching.Hybrid.OnCacheWriteErrorArgument`1
member.summary: An argument when a write error occured while writing to the cache.
member.typeparam: The type of result the retry strategy handles.
member.param: The cache key of the entry.
The entry that was attempted to be writted to the cache.
